title: Text
text: Text The text of the message, help text, language setup, panel or other global object. Technical Name: UTEXT Expected Value: String of Unicode characters. Default Value: None Applies To Menu Message Help Text Drag-and-Drop Format Language Setups Related Links Messages Messages are language-related objects that enable you to deploy a Uniface application in different languages and locales. They are stored in language-specific libraries, and Uniface automatically chooses the appropriate library at runtime based on the configuration. Drag-and-Drop Formats Drag-and-drop formats are global objects that define drag and drop behavior, including the default action, pop-up menu, and icon that are available when performing drag and drop actions in the tree and picture widgets. They are not used for drag-and-drop widgets. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
